title: re-engage eslint-plugin-unicorn
manager: Re-evaluate and re-enable the `eslint-plugin-unicorn` ruleset, which drifted out of the config during the perf work. Unicorn catches a broad band of modern-JS footguns — legacy idioms, error-prone patterns, non-portable APIs — so turning it back on with the rules that still fit keeps 6.x code idiomatic instead of accreting 2021 habits.
